task_completion.description: Verify the 4StoreyBuilding project is open in eQUEST.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST 3.65 main window is visible with '4StoreyBuilding' displayed in the title bar or the project navigator tree.

task_completion.description: Verify the ground reflectance for winter months (Jan, Feb, Dec) is set to 0.60.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Site Parameters, Ground Reflectance, or Monthly Schedule dialog/grid shows the values for January, February, and December explicitly set to 0.60.

task_completion.description: Verify the ground reflectance for March is set to 0.40.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same dialog or grid shows the value for March explicitly set to 0.40.

task_completion.description: Verify the ground reflectance for April through November is set to 0.20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same dialog or grid shows the values for April, May, June, July, August, September, October, and November set to 0.20.

task_completion.description: Verify the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation was run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress bar, a 'Simulation Complete' dialog box, or the eQUEST results viewer displaying the annual simulation results.

task_completion.description: Verify the project was saved after making changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' icon (floppy disk), selects File -> Save, or a save confirmation dialog is visible.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with eQUEST dialog boxes and menus, rather than just a text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Ensure the simulation was actually executed within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation dialogs or results should match the standard eQUEST/DOE-2.2 interface and not appear pasted or mocked.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the application by solely modifying the .inp file via command line tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands (like sed, awk) or text editors (like vim, nano) being used as the primary method to insert the GROUND-REFLECTANCE parameters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates on 4StoreyBuilding.inp in eQUEST 3.65 (DOE-2.2 engine). The VLM must verify the Ground Reflectance monthly schedule/parameters are set to: Jan=0.60, Feb=0.60, Mar=0.40, Apr=0.20, May=0.20, Jun=0.20, Jul=0.20, Aug=0.20, Sep=0.20, Oct=0.20, Nov=0.20, Dec=0.60. The default value is 0.2. The agent must run the full annual simulation and save the project.
